channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Kagurabachi 动画 Casts Tomokazu Seki as Kunishige
item.description: Seki plays protagonist Chihiro's father in anime premiering next April ― The official website for the television anime adaptation of Takeru Hokazono's Kagurabachi manga revealed on Friday that... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Kagurabachi Anime Casts Tomokazu Seki as Kunishige

item.title: [动画][开播] Anime News Network Red River Anime的 新作 Video Previews Hiroki Nanami的 开播 Song
item.description: Hiroki Nanami performs "Akatsuki no Sora" opening song ― The official website for the television anime of Chie Shinohara's Red River (Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori) shōjo manga began streaming the full... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Red River Anime's New Video Previews Hiroki Nanami's Opening Song

item.title: [剧场版][CAST] Anime News Network 2026 Crayon Shin-chan Film Casts FRUITS ZIPPER Idols Runa Nakagawa, Noel Hayase
item.description: Both voice guest roles in July 31 film ― The official website for Eiga Crayon Shin-chan Kikikaikai! Ora no Yōkai Bake-shon (Crayon Shin-chan The Movie Super Strange! My Yōkai Monster Vacation), the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 2026 Crayon Shin-chan Film Casts FRUITS ZIPPER Idols Runa Nakagawa, Noel Hayase

item.title: [PV][续作][公开] Anime News Network You I Are Polar Opposites 季度 2的 3rd English-Subtitled 预告PV 公开 Ending Song
item.description: Mega Shinnosuke performs "Unmei no Kimi" ending song ― The staff for the television anime of Kōcha Agasawa's romantic comedy manga You and I Are Polar Opposites (Seihantaina Kimi to Boku) presented... | 来源: ANN | 原文: You and I Are Polar Opposites Season 2's 3rd English-Subtitled Trailer Unveils Ending Song

item.description: The official website for the Mebius Dust television anime announced additional cast on Wednesday. The anime will premiere on Tokyo MX at 11.30 p.m. followed by BS Fuji and MBS on July 9. Cast Marimo... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Mebius Dust' Announces Additional Cast
